#!/bin/bash
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------
# MORINSOFT K8S LAB - LOCAL BUILD ENVIRONMENT
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------

# 1. Generate Kubeadm Token
TOKEN_PART1=$(openssl rand -hex 3)
TOKEN_PART2=$(openssl rand -hex 8)
export K8S_CLUSTER_TOKEN="${TOKEN_PART1}.${TOKEN_PART2}"
echo "Generated K8s Token: $K8S_CLUSTER_TOKEN"
export CLOUD_HELPER_USER="cloud_helper"
export NAT_SEG="br-nat"
export PRO_SEG="default"
export CLD_SEG="br-cluster"

# 2. Domain and DNS Hierarchy
export ACCOUNT="MorinSoft"
export ipa_domain="home.morinsoft.ca"
export public_zone="home.morinsoft.ca"
export cloud_zone="cloud.home.morinsoft.ca"
export cloud_provision="provision.home.morinsoft.ca"
export dns_zone="api.home.morinsoft.ca"
export ipa_master="ipa01.$ipa_domain"
export ipa_admin_principal="admin@HOME.MORINSOFT.CA"

# 3. Credentials & Hashes
export admin_set="On32Build4SysAdmin"
export admin_hash=$(echo -n "$admin_set" | openssl passwd -6 -stdin)
export secops_pwd="On32Secure4Sec0ps~"
export secops_hash=$(echo -n "$secops_pwd" | openssl passwd -6 -stdin)
export ipa_admin_password="On32L00kUpToo~"
export ipa_dm_password="On32dr1v3H0me~"
export metallb_vip="10.0.0.200"

# 4. SSH Key Management (Golden Image Injection)
export ssh_key_path="/home/cloud_helper/.ssh/id_rsa.pub"
export helper_ssh_pubkey_path="~/.ssh/id_rsa.pub"
export secops_key='ssh-rsa  rmorin@rl-10.morinsoft.ca'
export core_ssh_key='ssh-rsa  ansible-generated on helper.home.morinsoft.ca'


# 5. KVM & Virtualization Settings
export OS_VERSION="9.7"
export VM_HOST_IP="192.168.100.3"
export VM_HOST="kvmdc01.home.morinsoft.ca"
export iso_path="/var/lib/libvirt/images/Rocky-9-latest-x86_64-dvd.iso"
export VM_MEM=4096
export VM_CPU=4
export VM_DISK_SIZE=50
export VG_NAME="vg_kvm"

# 6. Networking & VIPs
export ingress_ip="192.168.100.30"
export nat_mac_device="52:54:00:79:8d:dd"
export default_netmask="255.255.255.0"
export cluster_gateway="10.0.0.1"

# 7. Kubernetes Software Versions
export kubetnet_version="1.34"
export crio_version="1.34"

export IPA_ADMIN_PASSWORD="On32L00kUpToo~"
export ipa_admin_principal="admin@HOME.MORINSOFT.CA"
export secops_key='ssh-rsa  rmorin@rl-10.morinsoft.ca'
export build_loops=120

# Helper working directory and key paths (on helper). Prefer env values.
export helper_ssh_pubkey_path="~/.ssh/id_rsa.pub"

export ssh_key_path="$HOME/.ssh/id_rsa.pub"
export secops_edkey='ssh-ed25519 AAAAC3NzaC1lZDI1NTE5AAAAIBHrv4WNtFzRbtS5TxvqTrhHbib5+C9Za6q+JcDi1pV6 rmorin@rl-10.morinsoft.ca'
export secops_key='ssh-rsa  rmorin@rl-10.morinsoft.ca'

echo "-------------------------------------------------------"
echo " MorinSoft Environment Loaded Successfully "
echo " Target KVM: $VM_HOST ($VM_HOST_IP) "
echo "-------------------------------------------------------"
